⚙️ Productivity

# ⚙️ Productivity

The **Productivity** pillar focuses on how to increase the speed and efficiency of development workflows. It could include principles such as automation, continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD), and the use of GitHub features like Actions and Packages.
